---
title: "test_debug_perf.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\quarantine\test_debug_perf.py"
loc: 13
complexity: 1
logic_score: 4.15
style_score: 3.90
intel_score: 7.55
overall_score: 5.09
---

## Intent
The `test_debug_perf.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_run_profile_mock, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, search. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_run_profile_mock, MockEngine, __init__, load_core_skills, load_skills_from_dir, build_index, search. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.9/10
- **Intel [I]**: 7.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 4 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.debug.debug_perf](file://src.tools.debug.debug_perf)

### Exports
- `test_run_profile_mock`
- `MockEngine`
- `__init__`
- `load_core_skills`
- `load_skills_from_dir`
- `build_index`
- `search`
